title: Random Animals Size
description: A little datapack to make animal mobs with random size.
body:
Lightweight and optimized datapack that gives newly spawned animals a slightly larger or smaller size than normal. Existing mobs remain unaffected, adding subtle variety without impacting performance.

Animals size will be between 70% and 150% the normal size (but being bigger than normal size is less common).

List of mobs supported :

    Allay
    Armadillo
    Axolotl
    Bat
    Bee
    Camel
    Cat
    Chicken
    Cod
    Cow
    Donkey
    Fox
    Frog
    Glow Squid
    Goat
    Horse
    Llama
    Mooshroom
    Mule
    Ocelot
    Panda
    Parrot
    Pig
    Pufferfish
    Rabbit
    Salmon
    Sheep
    Skeleton Horse
    Sniffer
    Snow Golem
    Squid
    Strider
    Tadpole
    Tropical Fish
    Turtle
